labs.title: Action Graph & Human Authority
labs.promise: Turn action into a scoped graph with human authority, rollback, and receipts.

labs.title: Proof-Carrying Artifact & Evolution Ledger
labs.promise: Let reusable capability earn upgrade rights through evidence and rollback.

labs.title: Independent Replay & Claim Promotion
labs.promise: Promote claims only after replay and independent review.

labs.title: ProofZero Planning & Evidence Reanalyze
labs.promise: Plan over proof states instead of persuasive futures.

labs.title: Proof-Gated Mission Foundry & Curriculum
labs.promise: Turn accepted proof into the next harder mission.

labs.title: Process-Resolved Evidence
labs.promise: Resolve evidence through process traces, lineage, and proof-native workbench logic.

labs.title: Blockchain Credibility Standard
labs.promise: Blockchain proves the transaction. GoalOS proves the work.

labs.title: Proof Mandate & Due Diligence
labs.promise: Require the proof package before trust, funding, reputation, or settlement readiness.

labs.title: Proof Before Settlement Research Standard
labs.promise: Turn the proof-to-settlement thesis into a research, adoption, and due-diligence standard.

labs.title: Executive AI Proof Console
labs.promise: Let every visitor choose a role, run gates, and understand the evidence package.

labs.title: From Loop to RSI
labs.promise: Move from proof-gated work into deterministic invention governance.

labs.title: Loop → RSI → ASI Console
labs.promise: Escalate through proof, RSI, and ASI-readiness gates without self-authorization.

labs.title: ASI Control Tower
labs.promise: Run stress tests, rollback drills, council review, and dossier packaging.

labs.title: ASI Mission Simulator
labs.promise: Simulate governed RSI-to-ASI missions with gates, receipts, and public-safe dashboards.

roles.label: First-time visitor
roles.headline: Start with the proof loop.
roles.brief: See the entire GoalOS arc in one place, then open the guided console.

roles.label: Blockchain / DAO
roles.headline: Require proof before settlement.
roles.brief: Use v28-v30 to turn vague milestones into proof packages and signed receipts.

roles.label: Executive / Board
roles.headline: Move from demos to institutional assurance.
roles.brief: Use v31 and the command center to brief non-technical decision-makers quickly.

roles.label: Auditor / Reviewer
roles.headline: Check replay, boundaries, and claims.
roles.brief: Follow the replay path, validator logic, and claim maturity arc.

roles.label: Frontier lab / RSI team
roles.headline: Govern invention before it compounds.
roles.brief: Use v32-v35 to understand deterministic invention operations and ASI-readiness gates.

roles.label: Public reviewer
roles.headline: Ask one question: where is the proof package?
roles.brief: Open the demand guide and inspect the public-safe claim boundaries.

modes.label: Start here
modes.message: The fastest path is the command center: choose a role, run the proof gates, then open the recommended lab.

modes.label: Proof before settlement
modes.message: Use v28-v30 when the trust problem is money, grants, audits, governance, or blockchain settlement.

modes.label: Loop → RSI
modes.message: Use v32 when the proof loop becomes deterministic invention governance.

modes.label: RSI → ASI readiness
modes.message: Use v33-v35 when the question is how to prevent self-improvement from becoming self-authorization.
